# tenableio_networks (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of networks from Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `networks` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))

- `description` (String)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

- `name` (String)

- `uuid` (String)
